warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x4 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 4 @ 55 + 65%
03:00 4 @ 75%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 4 @ 80%
09:00 4 @ 80%
12:00 4 @ 80%
15:00 4 @ 80%
18:00 4 @ 80%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM X 18 mins (6 rounds)
Min1: 12/10 Cal Row
Min2: 12 2xDB C&J
Min3: 12 Burpee Over DB
*Reduce reps to keep within 45-55 seconds of work per minute

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Posterior chain and leg accessory work balances pressing/rowing dominance while avoiding CNS fatigue from pull-ups and metcon conditioning.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 4 at 80 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: EMOM 18 minutes. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back hypertrophy, leg hypertrophy.
